Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Horizon Garage Door to get the job done right.

“Had a spring snap during last summer's heat wave - Horizon had someone at my Henderson home in under two hours. The technician explained how the 115°F days accelerate wear and showed me warning signs to watch for. So impressed with their knowledge of desert conditions!”

Marta S. Garage Door Repair
Mar 15, 2025

“Our new build in Summerlin needed doors that met strict HOA guidelines. Horizon not only found perfect matches but installed them with perfect alignment - no adjustments needed in 18 months despite the soil shifting. Their crew cleaned up so well you'd never know they were here.”

James R. Garage Door Installation
Feb 28, 2025

“Been using Horizon's maintenance plan for three years in my 1980s North Las Vegas home. They caught worn rollers before they damaged the track and always use some special high-temp lubricant that actually lasts between visits. Worth every penny in avoided repairs.”

Linh T. Preventive Maintenance
Jan 10, 2025

“Garage door wouldn't close after returning from a late shift at the casino. Called at 1:30 AM and Horizon had a tech here by 2:45 who fixed a bent track from a recent dust storm. Didn't try to upsell me, just got it working safely. Lifesaver!”

Carlos M. Emergency Service
Dec 5, 2024

“The new belt-drive opener Horizon installed is so quiet I can barely hear it from my bedroom above the garage. They programmed it to close automatically after 5 minutes - perfect for when I forget after unloading groceries in this Vegas heat.”

Susan K. Opener Installation
Nov 18, 2024

“Original door on our 1972 ranch near Downtown was sticking badly. Instead of pushing a full replacement, Horizon adjusted the tracks and replaced rollers with heavy-duty versions. Saved us thousands and preserved the home's character. True local experts.”

David P. Garage Door Repair
Oct 30, 2024
Horizon Garage Door

Trusted garage door professionals serving Las Vegas, NV and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
